requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Uzbekistan
requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质——乌兹别克斯坦无横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質——烏茲別克無橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Uzbekistan does NOT operate a horizontal RoHS-type restricted-substance regime for electrical and electronic equipment. It is not a member of the Eurasian Economic Union （EAEU）, so the EAEU technical regulation on hazardous-substance restriction in EEE （TR EAEU 037/2016）does not apply, and there is no EU-RoHS-equivalent national directive that restricts the ten RoHS substances across all EEE as a market-access condition. Where substance limits apply to LED luminaires in Uzbekistan, they arise only through specific product, electrical-safety, or chemical/sanitary rules （e.g., materials in contact requirements, hazardous-chemical handling）rather than a single horizontal restricted-substance list. Exporters should NOT assume an EU RoHS Declaration of Conformity is required or sufficient; instead confirm whether any product-specific or chemical-safety substance requirement attaches under current Uzbekistan technical regulation.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦不实行针对电气电子设备的横向 RoHS 类限用物质制度。它并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，故欧亚经济联盟关于电气电子设备有害物质限制的技术法规（TR EAEU 037/2016）不适用，亦无作为市场准入条件、对全部电气电子设备限制十项 RoHS 物质的欧盟 RoHS 等效国家指令。在乌兹别克斯坦，若物质限值适用于 LED 灯具，仅通过特定产品、电气安全或化学/卫生规则产生（如接触材料要求、危险化学品管理），而非单一横向限用物质清单。出口商不应假定须有或仅凭欧盟 RoHS 符合性声明即可；应改为确认现行乌兹别克斯坦技术法规下是否附有任何特定产品或化学安全物质要求。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克不實行針對電氣電子設備的橫向 RoHS 類限用物質制度。它並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，故歐亞經濟聯盟關於電氣電子設備有害物質限制的技術法規（TR EAEU 037/2016）不適用，亦無作為市場准入條件、對全部電氣電子設備限制十項 RoHS 物質的歐盟 RoHS 等效國家指令。在烏茲別克，若物質限值適用於 LED 燈具，僅通過特定產品、電氣安全或化學/衛生規則產生（如接觸材料要求、危險化學品管理），而非單一橫向限用物質清單。出口商不應假定須有或僅憑歐盟 RoHS 符合性聲明即可；應改為確認現行烏茲別克技術法規下是否附有任何特定產品或化學安全物質要求。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan — no horizontal RoHS-type restricted-substance technical regulation for EEE (not an EAEU member; TR EAEU 037/2016 does not apply)
Substance requirements, if any, arise via specific product / electrical-safety / chemical-safety rules under Uzbekistan technical regulation

summary.en: China operates a restricted-substance regime via GB/T 26572 （concentration limits for the original six RoHS substances — Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE — at the same thresholds as EU RoHS）and China RoHS 2 （SJ/T 11364 marking for restricted use of hazardous substances, requiring an orange/green hazardous-substance disclosure label on EEE sold in China）. The four EU phthalates added by EU 2015/863 are not in China's mandatory list. China RoHS focuses on disclosure labelling rather than blanket market-access restriction for all ten substances.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 26572（原六项 RoHS 物质——铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE——的浓度限值，阈值与欧盟 RoHS 相同）及中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364 电子电气产品有害物质限制使用标识，要求在中国销售的电气电子产品上贴附橙色/绿色有害物质披露标识）实行限用物质制度。欧盟 2015/863 新增的四项邻苯二甲酸酯不在中国强制清单中。中国 RoHS 侧重披露标识，而非对全部十项物质实施全面市场准入限制。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 26572（原六項 RoHS 物質——鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE——的濃度限值，閾值與歐盟 RoHS 相同）及中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364 電子電氣產品有害物質限制使用標識，要求在中國銷售的電氣電子產品上貼附橙色/綠色有害物質披露標識）實行限用物質制度。歐盟 2015/863 新增的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯不在中國強制清單中。中國 RoHS 側重披露標識，而非對全部十項物質實施全面市場准入限制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — Concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE (original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in EEE (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: This is a reverse gap relative to the EU comparison: where the EU adds requirements beyond China, Uzbekistan imposes LESS in the way of a horizontal restricted-substance regime. China requires GB/T 26572 limits and a China-RoHS disclosure label; Uzbekistan has no equivalent horizontal RoHS market-access condition. Practical points for a Chinese exporter: (1) an EU RoHS DoC or the four-phthalate testing required for the EU is NOT a Uzbekistan market-access requirement and should not be assumed mandatory; (2) the China-RoHS orange/green disclosure label is a Chinese domestic marking and is not required for Uzbekistan; (3) however, confirm whether any product-specific, electrical-safety, or chemical/sanitary rule under Uzbekistan technical regulation imposes substance constraints on particular materials — do not treat absence of horizontal RoHS as a blanket exemption from all chemical rules.
gap.zh: 相对于欧盟对比，这是一种反向差距：欧盟在中国基础上增加要求，而乌兹别克斯坦在横向限用物质制度方面要求更少。中国要求 GB/T 26572 限值及中国 RoHS 披露标识；乌兹别克斯坦无等效横向 RoHS 市场准入条件。中国出口商的实际要点：（1）欧盟 RoHS 符合性声明或欧盟要求的四项邻苯二甲酸酯检测并非乌兹别克斯坦市场准入要求，不应假定为强制；（2）中国 RoHS 橙色/绿色披露标识为中国国内标识，乌兹别克斯坦不要求；（3）但须确认乌兹别克斯坦技术法规下是否有任何特定产品、电气安全或化学/卫生规则对特定材料施加物质约束——勿将无横向 RoHS 视为对所有化学规则的全面豁免。
gap.zht: 相對於歐盟對比，這是一種反向差距：歐盟在中國基礎上增加要求，而烏茲別克在橫向限用物質制度方面要求更少。中國要求 GB/T 26572 限值及中國 RoHS 披露標識；烏茲別克無等效橫向 RoHS 市場准入條件。中國出口商的實際要點：（1）歐盟 RoHS 符合性聲明或歐盟要求的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測並非烏茲別克市場准入要求，不應假定為強制；（2）中國 RoHS 橙色/綠色披露標識為中國國內標識，烏茲別克不要求；（3）但須確認烏茲別克技術法規下是否有任何特定產品、電氣安全或化學/衛生規則對特定材料施加物質約束——勿將無橫向 RoHS 視為對所有化學規則的全面豁免。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal RoHS — Uzbekistan has no EEE-wide restricted-substance market-access regime (not EAEU; TR EAEU 037/2016 N/A); substance limits, if any, arise only via specific product/chemical-safety rules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure + limits) — GB/T 26572 limits for 6 substances and China RoHS 2 disclosure label required for EEE in China

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uzbekistan has NO horizontal RoHS-type restricted-substance regime for EEE and is not an EAEU member （TR EAEU 037/2016 does not apply）, so the EU/China hazardous-substance restriction model does not map directly. An EU RoHS DoC or four-phthalate testing is not a Uzbekistan market-access requirement and should not be assumed mandatory; the China-RoHS disclosure label is domestic-only. Still confirm whether any product-specific or chemical/sanitary rule imposes substance constraints on particular materials before treating this as a full exemption.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦没有针对电气电子设备的横向 RoHS 类限用物质制度，且非欧亚经济联盟成员（TR EAEU 037/2016 不适用），故欧盟/中国有害物质限制模式不能直接对应。欧盟 RoHS 符合性声明或四项邻苯二甲酸酯检测并非乌兹别克斯坦市场准入要求，不应假定为强制；中国 RoHS 披露标识仅为国内适用。在视为完全豁免前，仍须确认是否有任何特定产品或化学/卫生规则对特定材料施加物质约束。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克沒有針對電氣電子設備的橫向 RoHS 類限用物質制度，且非歐亞經濟聯盟成員（TR EAEU 037/2016 不適用），故歐盟/中國有害物質限制模式不能直接對應。歐盟 RoHS 符合性聲明或四項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測並非烏茲別克市場准入要求，不應假定為強制；中國 RoHS 披露標識僅為國內適用。在視為完全豁免前，仍須確認是否有任何特定產品或化學/衛生規則對特定材料施加物質約束。

requirement_topic.en: O'zStandart Conformity Certification / Declaration — Overall Market-Access Route
requirement_topic.zh: O'zStandart 合格认证/声明——整体市场准入路径
requirement_topic.zht: O'zStandart 合格認證/聲明——整體市場准入路徑

summary.en: Market access for LED luminaires in Uzbekistan runs through the national technical-regulation regime administered by O'zStandart （the Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation）. Depending on the product category and the applicable technical regulation, a product is placed on the market via either mandatory conformity certification （third-party certificate issued by an accredited Uzbek conformity-assessment body）or a declaration of conformity, supported by a conformity-assessment file: O'zDSt/IEC safety test reports （IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）, EMC evidence （CISPR 15 / IEC 61547）, photobiological-safety evidence （IEC 62471）, and any required energy/performance declarations. The in-country importer typically holds the certificate or declaration and is the on-market responsible party. There is no EAC mark （Uzbekistan is non-EAEU）; the relevant evidence and any conformity marking follow the O'zStandart national scheme. Verify the route （certification vs declaration）and the accredited body for the specific product category.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦 LED 灯具的市场准入须通过由 O'zStandart（乌兹别克技术法规署）管理的国家技术法规制度。视产品类别及适用技术法规而定，产品通过强制性合格认证（由经认可的乌兹别克合格评定机构出具的第三方证书）或符合性声明投放市场，并以合格评定文件支持：O'zDSt/IEC 安全检测报告（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）、电磁兼容证据（CISPR 15 / IEC 61547）、光生物安全证据（IEC 62471），以及所需的任何能效/性能声明。在地进口商通常持有证书或声明并作为市场责任方。无 EAC 标志（乌兹别克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟）；相关证据及任何合格标识遵循 O'zStandart 国家制度。请针对具体产品类别核实路径（认证还是声明）及认可机构。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克 LED 燈具的市場准入須通過由 O'zStandart（烏茲別克技術法規署）管理的國家技術法規制度。視產品類別及適用技術法規而定，產品通過強制性合格認證（由經認可的烏茲別克合格評定機構出具的第三方證書）或符合性聲明投放市場，並以合格評定文件支持：O'zDSt/IEC 安全檢測報告（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560）、電磁兼容證據（CISPR 15 / IEC 61547）、光生物安全證據（IEC 62471），以及所需的任何能效/性能聲明。在地進口商通常持有證書或聲明並作為市場責任方。無 EAC 標誌（烏茲別克非歐亞經濟聯盟）；相關證據及任何合格標識遵循 O'zStandart 國家制度。請針對具體產品類別核實路徑（認證還是聲明）及認可機構。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan technical-regulation regime — O'zStandart conformity certification or declaration of conformity for regulated products
Conformity-assessment file: O'zDSt/IEC 60598, IEC 62560, CISPR 15, IEC 61547, IEC 62471 evidence as applicable

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory route for in-scope residential luminaires is CCC （China Compulsory Certification）, administered by CNCA and conducted by authorised bodies such as CQC, against GB 7000 （safety）, GB 30255 （efficiency）and the EMC GB standards. Products outside mandatory CCC scope may use voluntary CQC certification. CCC is a Chinese national third-party certification scheme; it carries no recognition in Uzbekistan and does not substitute for an O'zStandart certificate or declaration.
summary.zh: 在中国，纳入范围的居民灯具的主要强制路径为 CCC（中国强制性产品认证），由 CNCA 管理，并由 CQC 等授权机构依据 GB 7000（安全）、GB 30255（能效）及电磁兼容 GB 标准实施。非强制 CCC 范畴的产品可采用自愿性 CQC 认证。CCC 为中国国家第三方认证制度；在乌兹别克斯坦不被认可，不可替代 O'zStandart 证书或声明。
summary.zht: 在中國，納入範圍的居民燈具的主要強制路徑為 CCC（中國強制性產品認證），由 CNCA 管理，並由 CQC 等授權機構依據 GB 7000（安全）、GB 30255（能效）及電磁兼容 GB 標準實施。非強制 CCC 範疇的產品可採用自願性 CQC 認證。CCC 為中國國家第三方認證制度；在烏茲別克不被認可，不可替代 O'zStandart 證書或聲明。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification for in-scope luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
GB 7000 / GB 30255 — safety and energy-efficiency basis assessed within CCC

gap.en: CCC and the O'zStandart regime are parallel national schemes with no mutual recognition. A Chinese exporter cannot rely on a CCC certificate for Uzbekistan and must build a separate O'zStandart conformity file. Key gaps: (1) determine, for the product category, whether mandatory certification or a declaration of conformity is the required route under Uzbekistan technical regulation; (2) engage an accredited Uzbek conformity-assessment body and, in practice, the in-country importer who holds the document; (3) supply O'zDSt/IEC-referenced test reports — CCC/GB reports are not automatically accepted, though an IEC CB-scheme report can often be leveraged; (4) note there is NO EAC mark （unlike EAEU members）and no EU RoHS DoC requirement （see leduz-rohs-01）. The conformity-route and local-importer dimensions are the main practical workload, since the technical standards are IEC-aligned.
gap.zh: CCC 与 O'zStandart 制度为并行的国家制度，互不认可。中国出口商不能依赖 CCC 证书进入乌兹别克斯坦，须另行建立 O'zStandart 合格文件。主要差距：（1）针对产品类别确定乌兹别克斯坦技术法规所要求的路径为强制认证还是符合性声明；（2）委托经认可的乌兹别克合格评定机构，并在实践中由持有文件的在地进口商配合；（3）提供引用 O'zDSt/IEC 的检测报告——CCC/GB 报告不被自动接受，但 IEC CB 体系报告通常可加以利用；（4）注意无 EAC 标志（与欧亚经济联盟成员不同），亦无欧盟 RoHS 符合性声明要求（见 leduz-rohs-01）。由于技术标准与 IEC 对接，合格路径及本地进口商环节是主要实际工作量。
gap.zht: CCC 與 O'zStandart 制度為並行的國家制度，互不認可。中國出口商不能依賴 CCC 證書進入烏茲別克，須另行建立 O'zStandart 合格文件。主要差距：（1）針對產品類別確定烏茲別克技術法規所要求的路徑為強制認證還是符合性聲明；（2）委託經認可的烏茲別克合格評定機構，並在實踐中由持有文件的在地進口商配合；（3）提供引用 O'zDSt/IEC 的檢測報告——CCC/GB 報告不被自動接受，但 IEC CB 體系報告通常可加以利用；（4）注意無 EAC 標誌（與歐亞經濟聯盟成員不同），亦無歐盟 RoHS 符合性聲明要求（見 leduz-rohs-01）。由於技術標準與 IEC 對接，合格路徑及本地進口商環節是主要實際工作量。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (route varies) — O'zStandart conformity certification or declaration of conformity required for market placement; route and accredited body depend on the product category; no EAC mark (non-EAEU)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope residential luminaires (CNCA/CQC); not recognised in Uzbekistan

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access in Uzbekistan runs through O'zStandart conformity certification or a declaration of conformity （route varies by product category）, supported by O'zDSt/IEC-referenced safety, EMC, and photobiological-safety evidence, and typically held by the in-country importer. There is no EAC mark （non-EAEU）and no EU RoHS DoC requirement. CCC/GB results are not automatically accepted, though an IEC CB-scheme report can often be leveraged. Confirm the required route and accredited body for the product category before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦的市场准入须通过 O'zStandart 合格认证或符合性声明（路径因产品类别而异），以引用 O'zDSt/IEC 的安全、电磁兼容及光生物安全证据支持，通常由在地进口商持有。无 EAC 标志（非欧亚经济联盟），亦无欧盟 RoHS 符合性声明要求。CCC/GB 结果不被自动接受，但 IEC CB 体系报告通常可加以利用。出口前请确认产品类别所需的路径及认可机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克的市場准入須通過 O'zStandart 合格認證或符合性聲明（路徑因產品類別而異），以引用 O'zDSt/IEC 的安全、電磁兼容及光生物安全證據支持，通常由在地進口商持有。無 EAC 標誌（非歐亞經濟聯盟），亦無歐盟 RoHS 符合性聲明要求。CCC/GB 結果不被自動接受，但 IEC CB 體系報告通常可加以利用。出口前請確認產品類別所需的路徑及認可機構。

requirement_topic.en: Importer, Marking, Language and Customs Documentation (Uzbekistan)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口商、标识、语言及海关文件（乌兹别克斯坦）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口商、標識、語言及海關文件（烏茲別克）

summary.en: Placing LED luminaires on the Uzbekistan market in practice requires an in-country importer to handle the O'zStandart conformity certificate or declaration, customs clearance, and on-market obligations. Uzbekistan is landlocked, so goods arrive by rail/road （typically via regional corridors）rather than seaport, and import documentation （contract, invoice, conformity certificate/declaration, certificate of origin）must align with customs requirements. Product marking, packaging text, and user instructions generally need to be acceptable to O'zStandart and customs, which in practice means Uzbek （and often Russian）language information for declared values, ratings, and safety instructions. Confirm the current importer-of-record obligations, the accepted languages, and any required conformity marking with the importer and O'zStandart for the specific product.
summary.zh: 实务上，将 LED 灯具投放乌兹别克斯坦市场须由在地进口商办理 O'zStandart 合格证书或声明、海关清关及市场义务。乌兹别克斯坦为内陆国，货物经铁路/公路（通常经区域走廊）而非海港到达，进口文件（合同、发票、合格证书/声明、原产地证书）须符合海关要求。产品标识、包装文字及用户说明通常须为 O'zStandart 及海关可接受的形式，实务上意味着标称值、额定值及安全说明须采用乌兹别克语（且常为俄语）信息。请就具体产品与进口商及 O'zStandart 确认现行登记进口商义务、可接受语言，以及任何所需合格标识。
summary.zht: 實務上，將 LED 燈具投放烏茲別克市場須由在地進口商辦理 O'zStandart 合格證書或聲明、海關清關及市場義務。烏茲別克為內陸國，貨物經鐵路/公路（通常經區域走廊）而非海港到達，進口文件（合同、發票、合格證書/聲明、原產地證書）須符合海關要求。產品標識、包裝文字及用戶說明通常須為 O'zStandart 及海關可接受的形式，實務上意味著標稱值、額定值及安全說明須採用烏茲別克語（且常為俄語）信息。請就具體產品與進口商及 O'zStandart 確認現行登記進口商義務、可接受語言，以及任何所需合格標識。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan customs and import documentation requirements (contract, invoice, conformity certificate/declaration, certificate of origin)
Uzbekistan marking/language expectations (Uzbek, often Russian) for declared values, ratings, and safety instructions

summary.en: For the China domestic market, the manufacturer or domestic distributor handles CCC marking, Chinese-language product marking and instructions （per GB 7000 marking and GB 5296.x-type instruction requirements）, and the China RoHS disclosure label. China is the export origin, so there is no in-country importer-of-record concept for the China side; export documentation （commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin）is prepared by the Chinese exporter for the destination's customs. China's domestic marking/language and CCC mark are not applicable to or accepted in Uzbekistan.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，由制造商或国内经销商办理 CCC 标识、中文产品标识及说明（依据 GB 7000 标识及 GB 5296.x 类说明要求）以及中国 RoHS 披露标识。中国为出口原产地，故中国一侧无登记进口商概念；出口文件（商业发票、装箱单、原产地证书）由中国出口商为目的地海关准备。中国国内标识/语言及 CCC 标志不适用于乌兹别克斯坦亦不被其接受。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，由製造商或國內經銷商辦理 CCC 標識、中文產品標識及說明（依據 GB 7000 標識及 GB 5296.x 類說明要求）以及中國 RoHS 披露標識。中國為出口原產地，故中國一側無登記進口商概念；出口文件（商業發票、裝箱單、原產地證書）由中國出口商為目的地海關準備。中國國內標識/語言及 CCC 標誌不適用於烏茲別克亦不被其接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000 series — Chinese product marking requirements; GB 5296.x-type instruction requirements
China export documentation — commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin

gap.en: The operational gap for a Chinese exporter is the in-country importer and localisation layer, which has no China-domestic equivalent: (1) an Uzbekistan importer-of-record is needed to hold the O'zStandart conformity document and clear customs; (2) goods move by rail/road into a landlocked market, so logistics and the certificate of origin/import-contract documentation must suit overland corridors; (3) marking, packaging text, declared values, and safety instructions generally need Uzbek （and often Russian）language, not Chinese; (4) the CCC mark and Chinese-language labelling are not accepted. None of this is a substance/RoHS issue — it is the conformity-holding, language, and customs layer that differs from both China-domestic practice and the EU model. Confirm importer obligations, accepted languages, and any conformity marking with the importer and O'zStandart for the specific product before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国出口商的操作差距在于无中国国内对应的在地进口商及本地化环节：（1）须有乌兹别克斯坦登记进口商持有 O'zStandart 合格文件并清关；（2）货物经铁路/公路进入内陆市场，故物流及原产地证书/进口合同文件须适应陆路走廊；（3）标识、包装文字、标称值及安全说明通常须采用乌兹别克语（且常为俄语），而非中文；（4）CCC 标志及中文标识不被接受。上述均非物质/RoHS 问题——而是与中国国内做法及欧盟模式均不同的合格持有、语言及海关环节。出货前请就具体产品与进口商及 O'zStandart 确认进口商义务、可接受语言及任何合格标识。
gap.zht: 中國出口商的操作差距在於無中國國內對應的在地進口商及本地化環節：（1）須有烏茲別克登記進口商持有 O'zStandart 合格文件並清關；（2）貨物經鐵路/公路進入內陸市場，故物流及原產地證書/進口合同文件須適應陸路走廊；（3）標識、包裝文字、標稱值及安全說明通常須採用烏茲別克語（且常為俄語），而非中文；（4）CCC 標誌及中文標識不被接受。上述均非物質/RoHS 問題——而是與中國國內做法及歐盟模式均不同的合格持有、語言及海關環節。出貨前請就具體產品與進口商及 O'zStandart 確認進口商義務、可接受語言及任何合格標識。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — in-country importer-of-record, customs documentation, and Uzbek/Russian-language marking and instructions required for market placement; verify accepted languages and conformity marking for the product
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (domestic) — CCC mark, Chinese-language marking/instructions (GB 7000 / GB 5296.x) and China RoHS disclosure label for CN market; not applicable to Uzbekistan

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Placing LED luminaires on the Uzbekistan market in practice requires an in-country importer-of-record to hold the O'zStandart conformity document and clear customs, overland （rail/road）logistics into a landlocked market, and Uzbek/Russian-language marking, declared values, and safety instructions. The CCC mark and Chinese-language labelling are not accepted. This is a conformity-holding, language, and customs layer — not a RoHS/substance issue. Confirm importer obligations, accepted languages, and any required conformity marking for the specific product before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 实务上，将 LED 灯具投放乌兹别克斯坦市场须由在地登记进口商持有 O'zStandart 合格文件并清关，经陆路（铁路/公路）物流进入内陆市场，并采用乌兹别克语/俄语标识、标称值及安全说明。CCC 标志及中文标识不被接受。这属于合格持有、语言及海关环节——而非 RoHS/物质问题。出货前请就具体产品确认进口商义务、可接受语言及任何所需合格标识。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 實務上，將 LED 燈具投放烏茲別克市場須由在地登記進口商持有 O'zStandart 合格文件並清關，經陸路（鐵路/公路）物流進入內陸市場，並採用烏茲別克語/俄語標識、標稱值及安全說明。CCC 標誌及中文標識不被接受。這屬於合格持有、語言及海關環節——而非 RoHS/物質問題。出貨前請就具體產品確認進口商義務、可接受語言及任何所需合格標識。
